chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery

text: 5053 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أُمُّ اَلْوَلَدِ حَدُّهَا حَدُّ اَلْأَمَةِ إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا وَلَدٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5053 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Riʾab from Zurarah from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"The prescribed punishment for Umm Al-Walad (a slave woman who has borne a child for her master) is the same as that of a slave woman if she has not borne a child."
